name: rewire
description: Open-source AI coaching skills that turn books into practice — structured protocols from ancient wisdom, modern psychology, and applied life domains

plugins.name: rewire
plugins.description: 12 AI coaching skills spanning ancient wisdom (Bhagavad Gita, Stoicism, Taoism, Buddhism), modern psychology (CBT, habit science, communication, meaning), and applied life domains (money, focus, mindset, relationships). Each skill is a full coaching protocol — not a summary, but an interactive coach that asks questions, assigns experiments, tracks progress, and holds you accountable.
